Podcast | Morgan Stanley Tech Talk 	
Andrew Percoco on TSLA Gigafactory visit covering Robotaxi / Cybercab, Optimus, Energy / Storage, Terafab, SOTP valuation | Episode 298	 
Play Audio <https://ny.matrix.ms.com/eqr/article/webapp/73d160ec-2492-11f1-99ea-46f6fece5bca?t=1774290953:9454:11968:acba1c0882e9&m=1&ch=CDF Research ISG Autoblast#e=c2VsbHNpZGVAdG9ya2NhcGl0YWwuY29tLmJy> 	 
(PDF: 10 Pages) 	
North America 	
	
Andrew S Percoco	 
March 23, 2026

	
Andrew Percoco discusses his trip to TSLA’s Gigafactory + management meetings covering the Robotaxi expansion (00: 51) + Cybercab ramp (04: 07), Optimus humanoid robot timeline (08:24), Energy / Storage business (11;12), Terafab potential (13:58), and SOTP valuation (16:52).
